sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64600" key="make/las" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰκέλας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of priest in Lydia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0216.tlg001:9:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.2</biblScope> </bibl> codd.</entryFree>
